_doc: Style palette per (style, room). Every prompt should pick materials/colors ONLY from its cell's palette. Ensures visual coherence in user-built sets.

japandi._dna: Japanese minimalism + Scandinavian warmth. Wabi-sabi, natural imperfection, earthy tones, asymmetric balance, low silhouettes.

living.wood_primary: light natural oak with matte oil finish, visible straight grain
living.metal_primary: matte black powder-coated steel, fine sandblasted texture
living.fabric_main: natural undyed linen, ecru / oatmeal, coarse weave
living.wall: warm off-white lime plaster, subtle texture
living.ceiling: smooth matte white plaster, soft warm cast
living.finish_note: all surfaces matte or honed — no high gloss

bedroom.fabric_main: washed linen, sand color, slubby texture
bedroom.finish_note: low contrast, warm undertones, all matte

bathroom.finish_note: honed stone, matte fixtures — never polished

kitchen.wood_primary: light natural oak cabinet fronts, oiled, visible grain
kitchen.metal_primary: matte black hardware and pulls, sandblasted
kitchen.metal_accent: warm darkened bronze tap and details
kitchen.fabric_main: natural unbleached linen towels, coarse weave
kitchen.stone: honed beige travertine countertop, visible pores
kitchen.wall: warm white limewash with subtle texture
kitchen.accent_color: muted clay terracotta pot or vase
kitchen.finish_note: no chrome, no high gloss — all matte and honed

modern_classic._dna: Transitional luxury. Symmetric layouts, polished marbles, jewel-tone upholstery, brass accents, classical moldings, refined craftsmanship.

living.wood_primary: rich dark walnut, polished open-pore, deep grain
living.metal_primary: polished antique brass, warm yellow tone
living.fabric_main: deep emerald green velvet, plush pile
living.stone: polished Carrara marble, soft grey veining
living.wall: soft warm grey plaster with subtle paneling moldings
living.ceiling: off-white plaster with ornate crown molding
living.accent_color: deep navy or burgundy (10–15% pillows / curtains)
living.finish_note: polished marble, polished brass, plush velvet — high contrast luxury

bedroom.wall: soft taupe paneled walls, ornate molding
bedroom.finish_note: elegant sheen on textiles, polished hardware, symmetry

bathroom.fabric_main: white Egyptian cotton towels, plush pile
bathroom.stone: polished Calacatta gold marble, dramatic veining
bathroom.ceiling: white plaster with cove lighting molding
bathroom.accent_color: deep emerald or sapphire accent (towels, soap dish)
bathroom.finish_note: polished marble and brass everywhere, high-gloss surfaces

kitchen.wood_primary: rich walnut cabinet fronts with raised panels, polished
kitchen.metal_primary: polished antique brass handles and tap
kitchen.fabric_main: white linen tea towels with embroidered trim
kitchen.stone: polished Calacatta marble countertop and backsplash, bold veining
kitchen.wall: soft warm cream with classical molding
kitchen.accent_color: burgundy or hunter green ceramic accents
kitchen.finish_note: classical raised-panel cabinetry, polished brass, dramatic marble

scandi._dna: Bright, functional, hygge. Light woods, white walls, soft wool, muted pastels, plenty of natural light, uncluttered.

living.wood_primary: light birch wood, soft white-washed finish
living.wall: crisp matte white painted wall, smooth
living.finish_note: bright, airy, low contrast, plenty of soft textures

bedroom.fabric_accent: cream chunky knit wool throw, sheepskin rug

bathroom.fabric_main: white cotton terry towels, soft loops
bathroom.stone: white matte porcelain large format tile
bathroom.wall: white subway tile, matte, narrow grey grout
bathroom.finish_note: all-white palette with one pale accent, matte surfaces

kitchen.wood_secondary: pale ash wood countertop edge or shelf
kitchen.fabric_main: white linen dish towel with grey stripe
kitchen.stone: white quartz countertop, soft grey vein
kitchen.accent_color: pale ochre or dusty sage ceramic (small)
kitchen.finish_note: minimal handles, flat panels, lots of white, single accent
